div.head: 208. Editorial Note
div.p:
On November 17, the White House released a paper on the balance-of-payments problem. In the field of international finance, it instructed the U.S. Government to
“(b) Continue urgently to insist that the other economically advanced countries of the free world increase their share of the long-term, truly developmental type of financing extended to the developing countries.” (Department of State Bulletin, December 5, 1960, page 862)
